description: Case style: Stainless steel round case with a fixed bezel Dial style: Grey dial with metallic hands Strap style: Grey plastic strap with a butterfly clasp for comfort and style Features: Three chronograph time displays, date aperture on the dial, branding on the 12 hour mark dial and screw to reset time Water resistance up to 50 meters, allowing you to wear it out while swimming but not poolside diving, snorkelling or water Sports Warranty: 2 years international warranty
